overall.description: A cinematic first-person walk through a mountainous game environment at dusk. The player travels along a winding dirt path past grazing sheep and ancient stone cairns, approaching a distant campfire with a towering mountain silhouetted against a cloudy blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley path with grazing animals

events.description: bright lens flare sweeps across the screen from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the valley toward the distant mountain peak

notable_agents.action: sheep grazing peacefully on the grass beside the path

entered.detail: large snow-capped mountain silhouetted against the cloudy sky
winding dirt trail through the valley floor
steep rocky cliff face forming the left valley wall
rocky hillside with sparse vegetation on the right
ancient stone wall ruins partially covered in grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide mountain valley at dusk, with the camera walking forward along a dirt path. Sheep graze peacefully on the left side near ancient stone ruins, while a massive mountain peak looms in the distant center. A bright lens flare sweeps across the screen at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain path with stone cairns

events.description: camera turns right and begins winding along the cliffside path
sheep exit view as path turns toward stone cairns

agents.ego_description: turning right along the winding path, moving away from the sheep toward stacked stone markers

entered.detail: stacked stone cairns marking the path along the right side

segments.scene_description: Following the light flare, the camera turns right along a winding cliffside path, leaving the sheep and valley ruins behind. Stacked stone cairns appear on the right, marking the trail as the mountain peak shifts to the left side of the frame. The terrain becomes rockier and more elevated.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook with campfire and stone markers

events.description: approaching campfire with visible flames and warm light
passing the campfire on the left and continuing along the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the campfire, continuing along the cliffside trail toward the distant mountain

entered.detail: burning campfire with orange flames and smoke near a wooden structure
small wooden shrine or shelter next to the campfire

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a burning campfire with a small wooden structure, casting warm orange light against the blue dusk. The camera passes the fire on the left and continues along the cliffside path, with stone cairns receding into the distance on the right and the mountain peak returning to center frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide mountain valley at dusk that gradually ascends a rocky cliffside toward a flickering campfire. It begins by walking forward along a dirt path past grazing sheep and ancient stone ruins, with a massive mountain peak looming in the distance. As a bright lens flare sweeps across the screen, the camera turns right to follow a winding trail, leaving the valley behind as stacked stone cairns appear and the terrain becomes more elevated. The scene then shifts toward a burning campfire and a small wooden structure that cast a warm orange glow against the blue twilight. Finally, the camera passes the fire on the left and continues along the cliffside path, with the stone cairns receding as the mountain peak returns to the center of the frame.
